input_summary.constitution: The feature must preserve auditability and user approval before implementation.
input_summary.spec: Add an export command for validated run artifacts.
input_summary.plan: Define artifact manifest, then implement export, then validate with fixture replay.

pass_criteria: No new standing OpenNort role is required.
The mapping can be represented with existing charter, finding, checkpoint, and implementation-plan artifacts.
fail_criteria: Spec tasks directly edit code during Run 1.
The mapping depends on hidden state outside OpenNort artifacts.
A user-owned policy choice is converted into an accepted fact.
negative_controls: Spec task that directly edits code before Round F approval.
Spec ambiguity that is silently converted into accepted evidence.
Mapping that requires hidden state not represented in OpenNort artifacts.
